summary: Tested P0 Bug Fix: Daily Login Reward bids_balance UI update. All features working correctly. After claiming daily reward, bids_balance updates immediately in both Navbar (882→883 Gebote) and Wallet page (data-testid='free-bids-balance' shows 883). No page refresh required.

daily_login_popup_display.details: DailyLoginPopup with data-testid='daily-login-popup' appears correctly after login (2 second delay). Shows streak count, reward preview (+1 Gratis-Gebote), and claim button.

daily_reward_claim.details: Clicking 'Belohnung abholen!' successfully claims reward. Console shows: {success: true, already_claimed: false, current_streak: 1, reward: Object}

navbar_bids_balance_update.details: Navbar bids balance updated from 882 to 883 Gebote immediately after claim without page refresh

wallet_page_free_bids_display.details: Wallet page Balance Card shows 'Gratis-Gebote: 883' with data-testid='free-bids-balance'. Element is visible when bids_balance > 0

refreshUser_callback.details: DailyLoginPopupWrapper correctly calls refreshUser() after successful claim via onRewardClaimed callback

BidBlitzPay.jsx.line_50: PASS - useAuth imports authUser and refreshUser correctly
BidBlitzPay.jsx.line_63: PASS - Local user variable renamed to 'localUser' to avoid shadowing authUser
BidBlitzPay.jsx.line_889-900: PASS - Free bids balance section displays authUser.bids_balance with data-testid='free-bids-balance'

App.js.line_210-228: PASS - DailyLoginPopupWrapper calls refreshUser after claim via handleRewardClaimed callback

DailyLoginPopup.jsx.line_171: PASS - Calls onRewardClaimed callback after successful claim

AuthContext.js.line_106-110: PASS - refreshUser function fetches latest user data from /api/auth/me

admin.note: Used for testing - can_claim was true

context_for_next_testing_agent: Daily Login Reward bug fix verified. The issue was that a local 'user' variable in BidBlitzPay.jsx was shadowing the 'authUser' from AuthContext. Fix renamed local variable to 'localUser' and added display of authUser.bids_balance in Balance Card. After claiming daily reward, refreshUser() is called which fetches updated user data including new bids_balance. UI updates immediately without page refresh.
